stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true?

options.a: A DVOR is a second-generation system which rotates the signal around an array of fixed antennas to electronically generate directional information.
options.b: A BVOR can be a CVOR or DVOR and only broadcasts information by voice rather than Morse code.
options.c: A TVOR is used for aircraft tests on the ground.
options.d: A VOT is a VOR but only carries spoken information and is used for ATIS.
